- heartbeats
- budgets
- audit trail
- approvals
- pause/terminate controls
- merge/deploy gates

Arthur is not Paperclip itself. Arthur is the Project Manager / Head employee inside the Paperclip company.

Hermes is not Paperclip. Hermes is the harness/runtime that runs an underlying LLM model with tools, memory, skills and sessions.

## Hard rules

- Paperclip may assign work.
- Paperclip may enforce budgets and gates.
- Paperclip may stage import payloads.
- Paperclip must not bypass human approval for governance, merge, deployment, production trading rules, or API-key permissions.
policies.hermes_harness_runtime:
# Hermes Harness Runtime Policy

Hermes is the only standard agent harness for Pantheon V8.

Hermes sits on top of the selected LLM model. The model may be GPT-5 mini, GPT-5.5, Opus 4.7 XHigh, Opus 4.7 Max, Gemini Pro 3.1, DeepSeek V4 Pro, or another configured provider model.

Hermes supplies:

- persistent memory
- skills
- session continuity
- tools
- MCP integration
- model-provider execution
- recurring routines

Hermes does not replace Paperclip. Paperclip is the company/control plane.
Hermes does not replace the model. The model is the reasoning engine inside Hermes.
